allow:
Bash(# 删除过于细致的子目录，将文档扁平化
# 01-product/specs 扁平化
mv docs/01-product/specs/*.md docs/01-product/ 2>/dev/null || true
rmdir docs/01-product/specs 2>/dev/null || true

# 02-architecture/services 扁平化
mv docs/02-architecture/services/*.md docs/02-architecture/ 2>/dev/null || true
rmdir docs/02-architecture/services 2>/dev/null || true

# 03-frontend/modules 扁平化
mv docs/03-frontend/modules/*.md docs/03-frontend/ 2>/dev/null || true
rmdir docs/03-frontend/modules 2>/dev/null || true

# 02-architecture/patterns/dispose-pattern 扁平化
mv docs/02-architecture/patterns/dispose-pattern/*.md docs/02-architecture/patterns/ 2>/dev/null || true
rmdir docs/02-architecture/patterns/dispose-pattern 2>/dev/null || true

# 删除空的目录
find docs -type d -empty -delete

# 查看最终结构
echo "=== 最终目录结构 ==="
find docs -type f -name "*.md" | sort)
